examples: A scientist showed that mouse leukemia could be transmitted by cell-free filtrates.
Government scientists have succeeded in isolating from mouse leukemia tissue another agent which has produced salivary gland cancers in mice.
Both won the Nobel Prize and had Leukemia because of radioactivity.
One of the most exciting is Glivec, STI-571, for chronic myelogenous leukemia (see box, page 34).
Biogen Idec has a new drug for chronic lymphocytic leukemia, which causes 20% of leukemia deaths.
